parkGraphUpserts.title: Park JSON upsert
parkGraphUpserts.subtitle: Paste a full or partial park JSON, preview the changes, then apply them without overwriting absent fields.

target.title: Target park
target.description: For updates, always select the existing park so the real technical id is used.
target.searchPlaceholder: Search a park by name, city or country…

options.createIfMissing: Allow creation when no park is selected
options.replaceCollections: Replace mode for missing collections (reserved for controlled imports)

editor.title: JSON document
editor.description: Absent properties are preserved. Zones/items arrays upsert only the entries they contain.

export.title: Park JSON export
export.description: Download the selected park's current graph as a JSON file.
export.noParkSelected: Select an existing park before exporting.

mode.title: Upsert mode
mode.description: Choose how the graph should treat existing collections before preview.

merge.title: Merge
merge.description: Keep absent collections untouched and upsert only entities present in the graph.

replaceCollections.title: Replace collections
replaceCollections.description: Allow controlled replacement behavior for collections managed by this graph.

graph.title: Graph overview
graph.description: Review the graph structure before preview.
graph.invalidJson: The JSON document is invalid. Open Expert JSON to fix it.

errors.noParkSelected: Select an existing park or enable explicit creation.
errors.fileReadFailed: The JSON file could not be read.

toasts.searchFailedDetail: The park search could not be completed.
toasts.previewFailedDetail: The preview could not be completed.
toasts.applyPartialDetail: Some entries were not applied. Review the details.
toasts.applyFailedDetail: The JSON could not be applied.
toasts.applyBlockedDetail: Fix the preview errors before applying.
toasts.blockRemovedDetail: The block was removed from the draft.
toasts.blockQueuedForDeletionDetail: The block is queued for deletion in the draft.
toasts.blockRemoveFailedDetail: This block could not be matched in the JSON.
toasts.errorsCopiedDetail: The details are in the clipboard.
toasts.copyFailedDetail: The details could not be copied.

result.title: Preview
result.pending: Run a preview to inspect changes before applying.
result.contentChangesDetected: Content changes detected ({{count}}). They will be updated if you apply this JSON.

templates.title: Graph templates
templates.description: Start from a controlled model, then adjust the builder or expert JSON.

parkOnly.title: Park only
parkOnly.description: Identity and park fields without zones or items.

zonesOnly.title: Zones only
zonesOnly.description: Prepare park areas without changing items.

zoneItems.title: Zone + items
zoneItems.description: Create one zone and one item linked by key.

servicesNoZone.title: Services without zone
servicesNoZone.description: Create service items without attaching a zone.

references.title: References
references.description: Prepare operators, founders or manufacturers only.

captainCoaster.title: Captain Coaster enriched
captainCoaster.description: Use metadata for an enriched Captain Coaster import.

builder.title: Graph builder
builder.description: Fill the common fields and generate a safe graph document. New automated content stays hidden and ToReview by default.

history.title: Graph history
history.description: Review previous previews and applies, inspect their outcome, and restart from the stored JSON draft.
